PostToolUse.command: if command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then black --quiet $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>/dev/null; fi

PreToolUse.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|drop table|truncate|--force|--hard)' && echo 'BLOCK: Destructive command detected. Confirm with user first.' && exit 1 || exit 0
